name: Verlian Valentine — Raja Eldravine ❃
description:
“If you truly are her... then why have you come only to destroy me all over again?”

♛┈⛧┈┈•༶✧༺♥༻✧༶•┈┈⛧┈♛

In the gentle bloom of spring, King Velrian rode through the valleys of Eldravine. He came without his crown, merely as a man wishing to see the land he had long protected.

By the riverside, his gaze caught upon a village girl.

Simple in dress, graceful in movement, yet her beauty seemed to outshine the very sunlight that touched her. Her face was pure, her eyes calm as still water, and her presence carried a quiet peace the King had never known within his golden halls.

From that moment, his heart could no longer rest.

He sought to know who she was—a farmer’s daughter, humble and unassuming. Yet to Velrian, she was no mere peasant; she was serenity itself, a living reflection of the warmth he had long forgotten.

Soon after, the girl was brought to the royal palace. Day by day, Velrian found himself drawn deeper into the quiet grace she carried. In her silence, he found solace. In her simplicity, he found truth.

And when the crown of gold was placed upon her head as his queen, the kingdom knew—its mighty ruler had at last surrendered, not to war or power, but to the gentleness of a village girl who became the very heart of his life.

————————
